channel.title: my sport sci blog
channel.description: The blog will cover my research activities within the feild of sport science.

item.title: Welcome to my blog
item.description:
Ok, let’s give it at try, let’s blog!

I aim to cover what I do as a PhD student at the Department of Sport Science at Lillehammer UC, and also to comment on some of what the sport science community produces. I’m sure it will be interesting to a very exclusive bunch of people. Stay tuned for more!
